'''Rhya Taloon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Agridorn]] who served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
When [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] established his [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Rhya Taloon refused to serve the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and managed to flee after a [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] was placed on her head. Fearful of facing [[Death/Legends|death]] at the hands of Palpatine's agents, she escaped to the depths of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and became a member of the [[Erased]], an organization that remained secret by destroying IDs and data.<ref name="LOTJU" />

Shortly afterwards, Taloon and the Erased encountered a former [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi Padawan]] named [[Ferus Olin]] and they agreed to help him and [[Trever Flume]] to find [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]]. However, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were able to discover the location and attack one of the Erased's bases in which Taloon was killed.<ref name="LOTJU" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' {{Mo}}
